top_signals.title: China Traders Hit Exit After Offshore Trading Curbs
top_signals.summary: Chinese investors are rushing to find alternative ways to buy and sell overseas equities after Beijing launched its most forceful crackdown on illicit cross-border stock trading to stem capital outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Board of Peace fund is empty
top_signals.summary: Despite $17bn in pledges, organisation is stuck in limbo with no money flowing to projects in Gaza

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Lahbib on the Communication on Humanitarian Aid
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 27 May 2026 Bonjour,
Qui n'a pas de principes ? Tout le monde a des principes !
Mais ce n'est que lorsqu'ils sont soumis à rude épreuve, que l'on sait s'ils seront plus que...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Singapore charges ex-Hodlnaut CEO over allegedly misleading claims tied to Terra collapse, faces up to 20 years in prison
top_signals.summary: Authorities alleged that the former CEO distributed claims stating that the company had not been impacted by the 2022 collapse of TerraUSD.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
